name: Delphi MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Delphi MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Delphi — a platform for creating AI-powered digital twins and expert knowledge clones — querying personalized AI personas trained on expert knowledge, accessing domain-specific answers from Delphi-trained experts, and integrating expert knowledge systems into agent-driven research and consultation workflows.
use_cases: Querying expert knowledge clones for specialized domain answers from research agents
Integrating personalized AI advisors into agent workflows from consultation agents
Accessing thought leader insights and methodologies from knowledge agents
Building expert-backed decision support from enterprise advisory agents
Consulting domain specialists via AI personas from professional workflow agents
Scaling expert knowledge across teams via AI clones from training agents
not_for: Teams without Delphi accounts or digital twin subscriptions
General-purpose AI queries (use direct LLM APIs for generic tasks)
Real-time data queries (Delphi knowledge clones use static training data)
best_when: An agent needs to consult a specific expert's knowledge clone on Delphi — for domain-specific insights trained on a particular person's expertise and content.
avoid_when: You need general AI capabilities or don't have a Delphi subscription — use Claude, GPT, or other LLMs directly for generic tasks.

auth.notes: Delphi API key required. Register at delphi.ai for API access. Knowledge clone IDs needed to query specific personas.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited free trial for Delphi; paid plans for full access
pricing.paid_tiers: Delphi subscription plans for digital twin creation and API access
pricing.notes: Delphi has paid plans for knowledge clone creation and API usage. MCP server is free. Query costs based on Delphi plan.

known_agent_gotchas: Delphi knowledge clones are only as good as the training data — quality varies by expert
Clone IDs must be known in advance — no dynamic discovery of available personas
Training data has a cutoff — clones don't have real-time knowledge of recent events
Niche platform — smaller community and less battle-tested than major LLM APIs
Official Delphi MCP but ecosystem is still maturing
Queries are billed — implement caching to avoid redundant expensive queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Data sent to Delphi cloud. Review Delphi data retention for sensitive queries. Store API key as environment variable.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key. Delphi cloud data handling. Store key as env var.
